svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"><diagram id="p1" name="Page-1"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="500" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="860" pageHeight="240" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="AG" value="Foundry agent
(RemoteA2A connection)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="85" width="200" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="CARD" value="Agent card
(host root OR custom AgentCardPath)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="20" width="360" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="MSG" value="A2A message endpoint" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="155" width="360" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="GET target + AgentCardPath" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="AG" target="CARD"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="POST message/send to card.url" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="AG" target="MSG"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="card.url points here" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="CARD" target="MSG"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
